shell.title: Presight Frontend MVP
shell.description: Architecture-first scaffold aligned with the exercise goals.
shell.installHint: Install the app for a standalone experience and faster relaunch.
shell.installHintIos: On iPhone or iPad, open Share and choose Add to Home Screen.
shell.installHintBrowserMenu: Open the browser menu and look for Install app or Add to Home Screen.
shell.updateReady: A newer app version is ready.

common.offline: You are offline. Some requests may fail.
common.restricted: You do not have permission to view this section.

home.title: Frontend architecture bootstrap
home.subtitle: Use this MVP shell to iterate quickly with backend and product teams.
home.profilesDescription: Paginated list with filtering and search.
home.streamDescription: Render streamed text while data arrives.
home.queueDescription: Submit jobs and receive async websocket updates.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.searchPlaceholder: Search by first or last name
profiles.empty: No profiles match the current filters.

stream-reader.title: Stream Reader
stream-reader.description: Reads response stream and renders incoming chunks in real time.
stream-reader.idle: Start the stream to display incoming text.

queue-worker.title: Queue Worker
queue-worker.description: Creates 20 queued requests and waits for websocket results.
queue-worker.pollingFallback: Live socket updates are unavailable. Using polling fallback for pending requests.
queue-worker.socketWatchdogWarning: Socket is connected but queue updates are stalled. Check backend runtime wiring.

error-boundary.description: Something went wrong while rendering this section.
